reviews.review_msg: Incredibly kind professor! Although he reads from his slides during lectures, but his exams are fair — cheat sheets are allowed! For written questions (20%), copy down all sample problems from his slides; he only changes the numbers. But MC questions (80%) are brutally detailed and require thorough knowledge of the material. SO READ YOUR TEXTBOOK!
Weiming liu is very very good he explains things very well
Really great prof, you can tell he cares about his students, has very fair exams, and will go out of his way to help you if you ask! the slides examples are comprehensive and well explained as well!

Weiming is great. He structures the course and exams very fairly, makes sure to emphasize exam topics in class, and is extremely approachable. One of the more genuine and kindhearted professors I've encountered at SFU. I definitely recommend.

I bombed Exam 1, receiving the lowest grade due to my incompetence. But Weiming's encouragement in Exam 2 helped me perform years better, getting near the highest mark! He adjusted the exam weight if we do better in Exam 2. I was considering dropping the course, and glad I didn't. His exams are fair, and he's like a nice dad + allows a cheat sheet!
I love him so much, hes my fav! I dont usually give a rating or comment, just read and leave. But Weiming Liu is the best out of the best! He makes SFU and Accounting great again! Thanks

He's a nice guy but he spoke to his TA in Chinese… His English isn't great so it can be hard to understand what he's talking about and he doesn't seem to have any pedagogical skills. The course also included too much content, you aren't able to actually learn intuitively and understand, hence the cheat sheet.

Weiming made BUS 254 an approachable course. He explained concepts clearly and welcomed any questions we had. Attendance is necessary because of the marked in-class group quizzes but the question pools for them are in the syllabus. His exams were super fair and reflected the homework and tutorial problems. He also allowed formula sheets on exams.
It is not an easy course, to be honest; he is a nice instructor and always willing to help his students. But the exams are pretty easy and straightforward, so choose him confidently!

Such a genuinely nice guy who tries his best to make managerial accounting fun. The class is a lot of work but his tests are very fair and easier than the content covered in lecture. Definitely recommend!
Not bad overall, the exams were easy compare to the lecture.
Pretty good professor to study accounting with at Beedie!
